body:
Heads up â€” the docent roster for next week still has you down for Tuesday morning but Carol hasn't confirmed who's covering the simulator exhibit. The Tuskegee Airmen panels are going up Monday afternoon, so the floor's going to be busy. Can you check the Monday board and let me know your shift before I finalize the kitchen calendar?

Also, do you want the 9 AM Tuesday or are you trading with someone for Thursday this week?

â€” Judith
snippet: Heads up â€” the docent roster for next week still has you down for Tuesday mornin...
subject: Museum shift next week

body:
Confirmed on the board: I've got Tuesday 9 to noon, simulator exhibit, and I picked up Thursday too since the Tuskegee panels open and they're short a docent for the school group. Carol's got me down for both.

Go ahead and mark Tuesday and Thursday mornings on the kitchen calendar as museum, do-not-move. I'll be home by 12:30 each day. No conflicts with the golf rotation â€” Tom and I are Monday, Wednesday, Friday this week.

â€” Paul
snippet: Confirmed on the board: I've got Tuesday 9 to noon, simulator exhibit, and I pic...
subject: Re: Museum shift next week

body:
Paul â€” Friday tee time. Pro shop bumped us to 6:42 instead of 6:30 because of the aeration on the front nine, so we're starting on ten. Walt wants to join and bring Erikson's brother-in-law, which means a fourth and probably forty minutes of backswing commentary. Your call.

Clubhouse breakfast after either way. You buying or am I?
snippet: Paul â€” Friday tee time. Pro shop bumped us to 6:42 instead of 6:30 because of th...
subject: Friday tee time

body:
6:42 off ten is fine, the desert will still be cool. Let Walt bring the brother-in-law â€” I'll keep my head down and let the commentary roll off. Just don't put me in his cart.

Breakfast is on me. You got the last two and I keep track. See you at the range by 6:15 to warm up the shoulder.
snippet: 6:42 off ten is fine, the desert will still be cool. Let Walt bring the brother-...
subject: Re: Friday tee time

body:
Done. Told the pro shop four for 6:42. Sue says hello and wants to know if you and Judith are still coming for dinner Saturday after the round. Bring the good red, not the grocery store one.

Warm up the shoulder. I'm not carrying you on the back nine again.
snippet: Done. Told the pro shop four for 6:42. Sue says hello and wants to know if you a...
subject: Re: Friday tee time

body:
Okay, I finally got the Zion itinerary roughed out. I've been going back and forth between basing in Springdale right at the entrance or doing the cabin a little further out, and I honestly can't decide. You're better at weighing the logistics than I am.

Can you take a look when you get a chance? I put everything in the Notion travel notebook â€” the page is called 'Zion 2026.' There's the lodge option, the Springdale hotel, and the shuttle schedule. I also pulled a couple of easier hikes since we want to take it slow this trip.

No rush, but I'd love to lock the direction before the weekend so I can call about the lodge Saturday morning.
snippet: Okay, I finally got the Zion itinerary roughed out. I've been going back and for...
subject: Zion trip planning

body:
Looked it over at lunch. Strong take: stay in Springdale at the entrance. The cabin reads nice but it puts us forty minutes from the shuttle every morning, and on a trip we're trying to take slow, that's forty minutes we'll resent by day three. Springdale lets us walk to the shuttle and be on the canyon floor early before the heat.

Take the Watchman Trail and the Riverside Walk for the easy days â€” both flat, both shaded part of the way. Skip Angels Landing this round; the chains aren't worth it and the permit lottery is a headache.

I can walk through the shuttle timing with you tonight if you want. After dinner?
snippet: Looked it over at lunch. Strong take: stay in Springdale at the entrance. The ca...
subject: Re: Zion trip planning

body:
Okay, you've convinced me on Springdale â€” I was already leaning that way but needed the push. And you're right about Angels Landing, I'll let that one go. Glad we're aligned.

After dinner works. I'll pull up the notebook on the laptop so we can go through the lodge dates and the drive day together. I found two routes up from Scottsdale and I'm torn â€” one's faster on the highway, the other runs past Flagstaff so we could stop and break it up.

Also â€” do you remember how many nights we did at the Red Rock Lodge in Sedona last spring? I want to size this one about the same so it doesn't run long.
snippet: Okay, you've convinced me on Springdale â€” I was already leaning that way but nee...
subject: Re: Zion trip planning

body:
Three nights at Red Rock last spring, and that felt about right â€” long enough to settle in, short enough we weren't living out of the 4Runner. Let's do three at Springdale and pad a night in Flagstaff on the drive up so we're not pushing it all in one day.

Take the Flagstaff route. The extra hour buys us coffee and a leg-stretch, and the drive past the high country beats the highway slog. I'll plan the fuel stops.

See you tonight. I'll wrap up by 6:30 so we've got time after dinner without it getting late.

â€” Paul
snippet: Three nights at Red Rock last spring, and that felt about right â€” long enough to...
subject: Re: Zion trip planning

body:
Hey Dad, wanted to get a few things sorted before you and Mom drive out. The guest room's ready and Hannah's got the air mattress for the kids if Owen and Lily want to camp in the playroom. Our flight back from the conference lands Thursday at 10, so plan on us being a little scattered that first morning.

Also â€” did you decide if you're driving the 4Runner the whole way or flying into Denver? Owen keeps asking if you're bringing the truck so he can sit in the front seat in the driveway. Let me know so I can tell him something true.

â€” Brett
snippet: Hey Dad, wanted to get a few things sorted before you and Mom drive out. The gue...
subject: Denver visit - getting things sorted

body:
We're driving the 4Runner. Tell Owen yes, the truck's coming and the front seat in the driveway is his â€” but only with the engine off and me in it. Two days up, we'll stop in Flagstaff the first night so your mother and I aren't worn out when we roll in.

Guest room and the air mattress sound perfect. Don't fuss over us that first morning; we'll get coffee and stay out of your way until you're squared from the conference. We're just glad to see all four of you.

â€” Dad
snippet: We're driving the 4Runner. Tell Owen yes, the truck's coming and the front seat ...
subject: Re: Denver visit - getting things sorted

body:
Perfect, Owen's going to lose his mind. Saturday we were thinking the zoo in the morning before it gets hot, then nothing too ambitious â€” Lily fades by early afternoon. Sunday we usually do a slow breakfast at the house. That work for you two?

One more thing â€” Kelsey and Daniel are trying to time a San Diego visit so the whole family's in one place later this summer. Nothing booked yet, but if you and Mom have park trips that lock up the fall, give us a heads up so we can aim around them.

â€” Brett
snippet: Perfect, Owen's going to lose his mind. Saturday we were thinking the zoo in the...
subject: Re: Denver visit - getting things sorted

body:
Zoo Saturday morning is just right â€” get the kids moving early, home before the heat, and let Lily nap on schedule. Slow breakfast Sunday is exactly the speed I'm after. No agenda beyond that.

On the summer plan: Zion's the only park we've got pinned and it's spring, so the fall's open. Tell Kelsey we'll flex to whatever puts everyone in one room â€” that's the trip worth planning around. Your mother already has the calendar out.

â€” Dad
snippet: Zoo Saturday morning is just right â€” get the kids moving early, home before the ...
subject: Re: Denver visit - getting things sorted

body:
All set on our end then. I'll tell Owen the truck's coming â€” you've made his week. Drive safe over Flagstaff and text Mom when you stop so we know where you are.

We really are glad you're coming out. The kids talk about you more than you'd guess. See you both soon.

â€” Brett
snippet: All set on our end then. I'll tell Owen the truck's coming â€” you've made his wee...
subject: Re: Denver visit - getting things sorted

body:
Hey, got the reminder that the 4Runner's due for its 30k service next week. They quoted $310 for the full interval â€” oil, rotation, the works, plus they want to look at the front brakes. I told them to hold until I checked with you. Do you want me to drop it Tuesday while you're at the museum, or wait until after the Zion trip so it's fresh for the drive? Let me know before Thursday.

â€” Judith
snippet: Hey, got the reminder that the 4Runner's due for its 30k service next week. They...
subject: 4Runner service due

body:
Do it before the trip, not after â€” I want the brakes looked at and fresh oil under us before we put 1,500 miles on it over Flagstaff. Tuesday works; drop it when you take me to the museum and I'll have Tom run me home after. $310 is fine, that's under the line. Tell them to go ahead on the brakes only if they're actually worn, not just to upsell. If they find anything over $400, have them call me first.

â€” Paul
snippet: Do it before the trip, not after â€” I want the brakes looked at and fresh oil und...
subject: Re: 4Runner service due

body:
Hey Dad, just confirming Sunday FaceTime â€” 4pm your time as always? Daniel's got a work call that might run long so it could be just me to start, then he'll hop on. Owen and Lily are going to be at Brett's, so if we time it right we can get everybody on one call for a few minutes before the kids melt down.

Also, can you have the iPad on the TV again? Owen liked seeing you 'big' last time and it saves you squinting. Let me know if 4 still works.

â€” Kelsey
snippet: Hey Dad, just confirming Sunday FaceTime â€” 4pm your time as always? Daniel's got...
subject: Sunday FaceTime

body:
4 o'clock, same as always â€” it's blocked and it doesn't move. I'll have it on the Apple TV so Owen gets me 'big' and your mother doesn't have to hold the iPad the whole call. Tell Daniel no rush; we'll get the kids on early before they run out of patience and he can join when his call's done.

Your mother's making her lemon chicken after, so we'll be in the kitchen and good and relaxed by 4. Talk to you Sunday.

â€” Dad
snippet: 4 o'clock, same as always â€” it's blocked and it doesn't move. I'll have it on th...
subject: Re: Sunday FaceTime

body:
Perfect. I'll text Brett to have Owen and Lily ready around 4 your time so we don't miss the window before nap-and-meltdown hour. You're the only grandparent they'll sit still for, so use your powers for good.

Give Mom a hug from me and tell her I'm counting on that lemon chicken story for after. Talk Sunday, Dad â€” love you.

â€” Kelsey
snippet: Perfect. I'll text Brett to have Owen and Lily ready around 4 your time so we do...
subject: Re: Sunday FaceTime

body:
Paul - Saturday group is set. Tee time moved up to 7:10 since the course is overseeding the back nine and wants us through early. Tom is in, and Greg Holloway is filling the fourth. Bring a jacket, it has been dropping into the 40s before sunup. You driving or am I?

- Walt
snippet: Paul - Saturday group is set. Tee time moved up to 7:10 since the course is over...
subject: Saturday tee time moved up
